from src.deps.dependency_order import resolve_order

order = resolve_order({\"api\": [\"db\", \"auth\"], \"db\": [], \"auth\": [\"db\"], \"ui\": [\"api\"]})
assert order.index(\"db\") < order.index(\"auth\") < order.index(\"api\") < order.index(\"ui\"), order

try:
    resolve_order({\"api\": [\"db\"], \"db\": [\"auth\"], \"auth\": [\"api\"]})
except ValueError as exc:
    assert \"api -> db -> auth -> api\" in str(exc), str(exc)
else:
    raise AssertionError(\"expected ValueError\")
PY"

commands_run:

from src.pagination.cursor_page import page

items = [
    {\"id\": 1, \"created_at\": 100},
    {\"id\": 2, \"created_at\": 100},
    {\"id\": 3, \"created_at\": 90},
    {\"id\": 4, \"created_at\": 80},
]
first, cursor = page(items, limit=2)
assert [i[\"id\"] for i in first] == [2, 1]

items.insert(0, {\"id\": 5, \"created_at\": 110})
second, cursor2 = page(items, cursor, limit=2)
assert [i[\"id\"] for i in second] == [3, 4]
assert first[-1] not in second
assert cursor2 is None
print(\"ok\")
PY"

commands_run:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
from src.ratelimit.token_bucket import TokenBucket

bucket = TokenBucket(rate_per_second=2, capacity=10, now=0.0)
bucket.tokens = 0
assert bucket.allow(cost=1, now=0.5) is True
assert bucket.tokens == 0

bucket = TokenBucket(rate_per_second=10, capacity=5, now=0.0)
bucket.tokens = 4
assert bucket.allow(cost=1, now=1.0) is True
assert bucket.tokens == 4

bucket = TokenBucket(rate_per_second=10, capacity=5, now=10.0)
bucket.tokens = 1
assert bucket.allow(cost=2, now=9.0) is False
assert bucket.tokens == 1
assert bucket.updated_at == 9.0
PY"

commands_run:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
from src.ci.junit_summary import summarize

assert summarize('<testsuite tests=\"2\" failures=\"1\" errors=\"0\" skipped=\"1\"></testsuite>') == {
    'tests': 2,
    'failures': 1,
    'errors': 0,
    'skipped': 1,
}
assert summarize('''<testsuites tests=\"99\" failures=\"99\" errors=\"99\" skipped=\"99\">
  <testsuite tests=\"1\" failures=\"0\" errors=\"0\" skipped=\"0\"><testcase /></testsuite>
  <testsuite>
    <testcase><failure /></testcase>
    <testcase><error /></testcase>
    <testcase><skipped /></testcase>
  </testsuite>
</testsuites>''') == {
    'tests': 4,
    'failures': 1,
    'errors': 1,
    'skipped': 1,
}
assert summarize('''<testsuite tests=\"99\" failures=\"99\" errors=\"99\" skipped=\"99\">
  <testsuite><testcase /><testcase><failure /><failure /></testcase></testsuite>
</testsuite>''') == {
    'tests': 2,
    'failures': 2,
    'errors': 0,
    'skipped': 0,
}
assert summarize('<testsuites />') == {'tests': 0, 'failures': 0, 'errors': 0, 'skipped': 0}
print('targeted junit_summary checks passed')
PY"

import json
from src.streaming.ndjson import parse_chunks

assert parse_chunks(['{\"a\":', '1}\\n{\"b\":2}\\n']) == [{\"a\": 1}, {\"b\": 2}]
assert parse_chunks(['\\n', '  \\n', '{\"ok\": true}\\n']) == [{\"ok\": True}]
assert parse_chunks(['{\"tail\":', '3}']) == [{\"tail\": 3}]
try:
    parse_chunks(['{\"bad\":'])
except json.JSONDecodeError:
    pass
else:
    raise AssertionError('expected JSONDecodeError')
PY"
